notes: Full ingredient → USDA fdc_id mapping (47 ingredients, 10 recipes). T-006 PoC (7 Veggie Omelette) + T-013 finalization (40 remaining). Raw-default per PRP D10. null fdc_id = negligible-macros seasoning.

policy.missing_policy: null fdc_id = ingredient contributes 0 to totals AND triggers coverage-incomplete None response per PRP D12

ingredients.description: Beverages, almond milk, unsweetened, shelf stable
ingredients.note: Unsweetened shelf-stable almond milk (15 kcal/100g). Chosen over 168751 (sweetened vanilla) and 1750338 (rebranded duplicate). T-013.

ingredients.description: Soup, beef broth or bouillon canned, ready-to-serve
ingredients.note: Ready-to-serve beef broth (7 kcal/100g). Closest to how broth is used in Beef Stew recipe. T-013.
Canned ready-to-serve beef gravy (53 kcal/100g). Only generic USDA beef gravy entry. T-013.
Generic raw blueberries (60 kcal/100g). Chosen over duplicate raw entries. T-013.
Dry plain bread crumbs (395 kcal/100g). Chosen over 172806 (seasoned) — plain matches generic recipe use. T-013.
Generic raw broccoli (33 kcal/100g). Florets are the same macros as whole broccoli per 100g. Chosen over duplicate raw entries. T-013.
Standard salted butter (717 kcal/100g). Only generic USDA butter entry at this macro level. T-013.
Generic raw carrot (41 kcal/100g). Singular 'carrot' maps to the same USDA entry as 'carrots'. T-013.
Generic raw carrots (41 kcal/100g). Chosen over salad variants (2345174 / 2345175) which are compound dishes. T-013.
Generic raw celery (14.6 kcal/100g). Chosen over duplicate raw entries. T-013.
Dried chia seeds (486 kcal/100g). Chosen over 2343065 (rebrand duplicate with identical macros). T-013.

ingredients.description: Chicken, broiler or fryers, breast, skinless, boneless, meat only, raw
ingredients.note: Generic raw skinless boneless chicken breast (120 kcal/100g). Best match to recipe-style 'chicken breast'. Chosen over 171474 (meat and skin, 172 kcal) and 171509 (added solution variant). T-013.

ingredients.description: Soup, chicken broth, low sodium, canned
ingredients.note: Low-sodium canned chicken broth (16 kcal/100g). Closest to how broth is used in Pureed Chicken + Sweet Potato recipe. T-013.
Atlantic cod raw (82 kcal/100g). Chosen per T-013 hint — Atlantic over Pacific as default. T-013.
Ground cumin seed spice (375 kcal/100g). Small amount per recipe (5g) but nonzero macros per PRP D10. T-013.
Generic raw onion — dicing does not change macros. Chosen over color-specific variants (red/yellow/white) since recipe does not specify.

ingredients.description: Tomatoes, red, ripe, raw, year round average
ingredients.note: Most representative raw tomato entry — red/ripe is the default culinary assumption for 'diced tomato' in a breakfast omelette.
Generic raw whole egg (143 kcal/100g). Same entry as 'large eggs' since 'egg' in Turkey Meatloaf is culinarily identical. T-013.

ingredients.description: Wheat flour, white, all-purpose, enriched, bleached
ingredients.note: Standard enriched all-purpose white flour (364 kcal/100g). Default flour in Beef Stew recipe. T-013.
Generic raw garlic (144 kcal/100g). Chosen over duplicate raw entries. T-013.
Generic raw ginger root (80 kcal/100g). Chosen over 170926 (spice, ground, dry — 335 kcal) and pickled variants — recipe uses fresh ginger. T-013.
Homemade granola (489 kcal/100g). Chosen over 173892 (QUAKER brand-specific) per brand-avoidance rule. T-013.

ingredients.description: Yogurt, Greek, plain, nonfat (Includes foods for USDA's Food Distribution Program)
ingredients.note: Greek plain nonfat yogurt (59 kcal/100g). Chosen over CHOBANI brand variants (170864/170891). T-013.
Raw ground lamb (282 kcal/100g). Chosen over 172544 (cooked, broiled) per raw-default and 2341313 (rebrand duplicate). T-013.
Raw ground turkey (148 kcal/100g). Chosen over fat-free variants (172847+) which are specific cuts — recipe uses standard ground turkey. T-013.
Generic honey (304 kcal/100g). Chosen over 2345841 (rebrand duplicate with identical macros). T-013.
Standard ketchup (109 kcal/100g). Chosen over 747693 (restaurant variant) and 2345247 (reduced sodium) — generic default. T-013.
Generic raw whole chicken egg — shell excluded per USDA convention. Chosen over 2342627 (duplicate, but has less descriptive suffix) and 170893 (salted/pasteurized variant).
Generic raw lemon (29 kcal/100g). Only USDA lemon-raw entry. T-013.

ingredients.description: Potato, mashed, from fresh, made with milk
ingredients.note: Mashed potato made fresh with milk (114 kcal/100g). Closest to Shepherd's Pie recipe which combines mashed potato with butter (dairy allergen tagged). Chosen over ready-to-heat (2344989) and fast-food variants. T-013.

null: USDA has no 'mixed berries' entry. Parfait recipe (150g) contains unspecified berry blend. Macros will be approximated at 0; for production, replace with e.g. blueberries+strawberries split. Flagged for human review. T-013.

Canonical USDA olive oil entry (884 kcal/100g, 100g fat). Chosen over 748608 (extra virgin, 0 kcal — data issue) and 2345743 (duplicate 'Olive oil' with 900 kcal — likely rounded). 171413 has the most reliable macros.
Generic raw onion (39 kcal/100g). Same as 'diced onion'. T-013.
Generic raw parsley (36 kcal/100g). Only USDA parsley-raw entry. T-013.
Frozen unprepared peas and carrots (53 kcal/100g). Chosen over cooked variants per raw-default and over canned variants per freshness preference. Shepherd's Pie typically uses frozen veg. T-013.
Generic raw potatoes with flesh and skin (77 kcal/100g). Chosen over russet/white/red variants since recipe does not specify. T-013.
Sweet red pepper raw (26 kcal/100g). Per T-013 hint. T-013.
Generic raw lentils (352 kcal/100g). Per T-013 hint — USDA does not distinguish red/brown/green lentil varieties. T-013.

ingredients.description: Cereals, oats, regular and quick, not fortified, dry
ingredients.note: Dry rolled oats (379 kcal/100g). Chosen over 169705 ('Oats' generic with food-distribution-program suffix) — this entry most directly describes culinary rolled oats. T-013.

null: negligible macros — seasoning only contributes trace sodium. Per PRP D12, null fdc_id triggers coverage-incomplete None response only if macro calculation is demanded on an incomplete set; since salt/pepper legitimately has ~0 kcal/protein/carbs/fat, excluding it from totals is correct.

Generic corn tortilla (218 kcal/100g). Size does not affect per-100g macros. Chosen over 175036 (same macros but older SR-Legacy entry) and 173241 (without added salt variant — recipe does not specify salt exclusion).

ingredients.description: Soy sauce made from soy and wheat (shoyu)
ingredients.note: Standard soy+wheat shoyu (53 kcal/100g). Per T-013 hint — canonical USDA reference entry. Chosen over reduced-sodium (172473) and tamari (174278) since recipe does not specify. T-013.
Generic raw spinach. 'Leaves' implies the leafy portion, which is the entire edible part of spinach.

ingredients.description: Beef, chuck, arm pot roast, separable lean and fat, trimmed to 1/8" fat, all grades, raw
ingredients.note: Beef chuck arm pot roast raw, all grades (244 kcal/100g). Most common stew-beef cut per T-013 hint. Chosen over choice-only (168668) and select-only (168670) variants — 'all grades' is the generic default. T-013.

ingredients.description: Sweet potato, raw, unprepared (Includes foods for USDA's Food Distribution Program)
ingredients.note: Raw unprepared sweet potato (86 kcal/100g). Chosen over cooked/baked/boiled/fried variants per raw-default. T-013.

ingredients.description: Soup, vegetable broth, ready to serve
ingredients.note: Ready-to-serve vegetable broth (5 kcal/100g). Chosen over 171180 (SWANSON brand-specific) and 2345664 (bouillon variant). T-013.

ingredients.description: Rice, white, long-grain, regular, raw, enriched
ingredients.note: White long-grain rice raw enriched (365 kcal/100g). Per T-013 hint — standard white-rice entry. 'unenriched' variant does not exist as a separate entry in this DB; enriched is the default. T-013.
